use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and user interfaces
Navigation and routing through clickable buttons
Form submission with visual feedback states
Accessible keyboard navigation with focus-visible styling
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for variant management. Features multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, with accessible focus states and hover transitions. Designed as a foundational UI primitive suitable for any industry or platform.
